/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -pthread CMakeFiles/mpi_cuda_tests.dir/tests/test_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mpi_cuda_tests.dir/src/mpi_distribution.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mpi_cuda_tests.dir/src/cpu_reference.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mpi_cuda_tests.dir/src/cuda_kernels.cu.o CMakeFiles/mpi_cuda_tests.dir/src/benchmarks.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mpi_cuda_tests.dir/cmake_device_link.o -o mpi_cuda_tests   -L/apps/cuda/cuda-12.4/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openmpi/lib /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openmpi/lib/libmpi_cxx.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openmpi/lib/libmpi.so -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
